message:
web: Add collapsible steps to transcript view

Group unimportant messages (Read, Bash, Grep, thinking, etc.) into
collapsible sections. Shows diff stats (+/-/~) from Write/Edit tools
next to the toggle button. Important messages (user prompts, final
agent responses) remain expanded.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/hpnyf840l453gx4ojuoygbme
